name: release-it
description: Build production-ready systems with stability patterns: circuit breakers, bulkheads, timeouts, and retry logic. Use when the user mentions "production outage", "circuit breaker", "timeout strategy", "deployment pipeline", "chaos engineering", "bulkhead pattern", "retry with backoff", "health checks", "my service keeps crashing", "prevent cascading failures", or "make it resilient". Also trigger when designing resilient microservices, planning zero-downtime deployments, or investigating cascading
author: wondelai
